title: Ship Manager
description:
Salling Search is recruiting a Ship Manager for a shipping company based in Singapore.

  • Manage and operate vessels safely in compliance with IMS procedures and national/international regulations.

  • Monitor and evaluate suppliers and subcontractors on quality, environmental, and safety performance.

  • Control vessel expenditure, prepare budgets, and advise clients on overspending.

  • Procure and maintain adequate spares and equipment to ensure continuous operation.

  • Consult Head of Fleet on deviations from IMS or regulatory requirements.

  • Monitor maintenance systems, implement cost-saving measures, and address machinery issues promptly.

  • Conduct regular inspections, maintain dry dock schedules, and oversee docking procedures.

  • Evaluate and appraise shipboard personnel on safety, health, environmental, and service performance.

  • Liaise with stakeholders, including Class, Oil Majors, shipowners, and suppliers, for effective vessel operations.

  • Support insurance claims by coordinating with underwriters and providing technical documentation.

  • Implement preventive measures to avoid machinery breakdowns and ensure compliance with SOLAS, MARPOL, STCW, Class, Flag State, and Oil Major requirements.

  • Coordinate closely with internal departments (Commercial, SHEQ, Manning, Accounts) for safe and smooth vessel operations.

  • Provide technical support for safety observations and inspections.

  • Ensure Purchasing Executives and Technical Secretaries perform their duties effectively.

  • Ensure timely reporting of operational expenditure and relevant documentation to the Fleet Manager.

  • Lead initiatives supporting BW Epic Kosan’s business strategy and UN Sustainable Development Goals.

  • Perform any ad hoc duties or projects assigned by Fleet Manager, Technical Director, or CEO.


Contact Kirc Lyndell Jareno at kirc@sallingsearch.com for more info or apply via our website.

LEGASPI ELLAINE GOROSPE

Ellaine Legaspi Gorospe

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2015, Salling Search is a leading search and recruitment consultancy headquartered in Singapore with a branch office in Denmark. 

Our specialisation lies in sourcing exceptional mid to senior-level talent within the Maritime, Trading and Logistics sectors worldwide. 

Aspiring to be the best choice for both candidates and clients, we offer bespoke recruitment solutions tailored to their unique needs. With a global reach, we excel in identifying and attracting top maritime talent to drive success worldwide.
